svg.title: Lid — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Lid frame: X=width(0..160), Y=depth(0..155), Z=thickness(0..4, bottom=0)
SECTION B-B (looking along +Y, cut at Y=60)
DETAIL A: Snap Tab (left side, XZ section)
Scale 15:1 (15 px/mm) — YZ section at X=80
1. 8 snap tabs (4 per long edge) engage tray detent ridges (Sub-H). Slot-released cantilever design, 8mm effective length.
2. Bezel pocket T1 resolves design gap in Sub-I: lid hosts the top bezel snap tab pocket (5mm wide x 3mm deep x 2.5mm tall).
